title: The ToolsOutputFilters JSON schema
description: ToolsOutputFilters is a specification for defining output filters on MCP tools responses to slim down payloads before they reach LLMs.

service.title: The target Service for ToolsOutputFilters
service.description: Holds reference information about this Service output filters relate.

name.title: The name of Service these output filters relate to.
name.description: Human readable name of the target Service for output filters.

version.title: The version of API these output filters relate to.
version.description: Human readable version of the target Service for output filters.

filters.title: The Service tools output filters.
filters.description: The output filters are defined with tool name as key.

filterItem.title: One output filter definition
filterItem.description: One output filter definition targeting a specific tool.

jsonRetain.title: JSON Pointer paths to retain in the output. Only these branches are kept, everything else is removed.

jsonPatches.title: JSON Patch operations (RFC 6902) to apply on the output.

patchOperation.title: A JSON Patch operation as per RFC 6902.
